meaning: adj.[隗｣]閼頑､惹ｸ顔噪 譽倅ｸ顔噪
examples: The groovy decompression at supraspinal ligament remained with hemi-circle could be accordant with biomechanics and anatomy.

CONCLUSION Nocistatin and nocistatin (10‾17) were shown to reverse the effects of nociceptin in antagonizing endomorphin-1 and endomorphin-2 analgesia at supraspinal level.
